function: () => { const panel = document.getElementById('draw-strength-panel'); const readout = document.getElementById('draw-strength-readout'); const label = document.getElementById('draw-strength-label'); if (window.app?._simulateDrawStrength) { window.app._simulateDrawStrength({ connected: true, draw_strength_source: '/p/app/htr/air', draw_strength_percent: 50, draw_strength_active: true, draw_strength_mode: 'dynamic_inhale' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { const state50 = { panelClasses: panel.className, readoutText: readout.textContent, labelText: label.textContent, ariaNow: panel.getAttribute('aria-valuenow'), ariaText: panel.getAttribute('aria-valuetext') }; window.app._simulateDrawStrength({ connected: true, draw_strength_source: '/p/app/htr/air', draw_strength_percent: 100, draw_strength_active: true, draw_strength_mode: 'dynamic_inhale' }); setTimeout(() => { const stateMaxed = { panelClasses: panel.className, readoutText: readout.textContent, labelText: label.textContent, ariaNow: panel.getAttribute('aria-valuenow'), hasBarMaxed: panel.classList.contains('bar-maxed') }; r({ state50, stateMaxed }); }, 200); }, 250)); } return 'no simulator'; }
